##!source.syntax=xwiki/2.1
{{template name="editors/xdom_macros.vm"/}}

{{template name="blocknote/macros.wiki" /}}

{{velocity}}
{{html clean="false"}}
#if ($edit)
  #getTextArea
  #if ($services.wysiwyg.isSyntaxSupported($syntaxId))
    #set ($discard = $textArea.attributes.put('data-source-document-reference',
      $edit.parameters.sourceDocumentReference))
    ## The source property reference (when the edited content is an object property) is used server-side only, to
    ## render the content with the rights of the document author. It's removed from the attributes by #blocknote so that
    ## it's not output as an HTML attribute.
    #set ($discard = $textArea.attributes.put('data-source-property-reference',
      $edit.parameters.sourcePropertyReference))
    #blocknote($textArea)
  #else
    ## Fall back on a plain text area.
    #printTextArea($textArea)
  #end
#end
{{/html}}
{{/velocity}}
